prompt: I just built src/components/ProjectCard.tsx. Run imprint on that component so future cards match it.
assertions: Reads the explicitly provided component path instead of scanning unrelated files first
Extracts background, border, radius, text colors, text sizing/weight, spacing, hover/focus, shadow, and accent usage where present
Does not extract width, height, structural flex/grid layout, positioning, or responsive variants as consistency rules
Creates ui-registry.md if missing or appends/updates the component entry if present
Uses the documented registry entry format with file path, last updated date, property table, and pattern notes
Confirms what was captured and flags any surprising inconsistency
